name: banner
title: Banner
description: Intent-colored message bar. Supports floating toast mode with auto-dismiss and fade-out animation.

consumption.typeImport: import type { BannerProps, BannerIntent, BannerContrast } from '@compomo/ui';

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Banner. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.
Used internally by Banner. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.

floating.description: Renders as portal toast with auto-dismiss.
